description_long: This office building complex consists of three interconnected structures of varying heights and facades, set on a shared base with adjacent sidewalks. The tallest section features a modern glass curtain wall with a grid of windows and red vertical accents, suggesting a contemporary design. The mid-rise block is clad in a light beige material with evenly spaced rectangular windows, while the third section is a gray, boxy structure with a regular window pattern and a recessed ground floor. The base includes a paved area and a black sidewalk, with several awning-like structures visible on one side. The building's entrances are simple and functional, with no visible signage or decorative elements. The overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on geometric forms and regular window arrangements.
description: A modern office building complex with three interconnected blocks, featuring glass, beige, and gray facades, regular window patterns, and a shared paved base.
description_view_0: This view highlights the beige mid-rise block with its regular window grid and the narrow side of the glass tower, set against a black sidewalk.
description_view_1: The front view shows all three building sections: the glass tower with red accents, the beige block, and the gray block with green-tinted windows and a recessed entry.
description_view_2: This rear view emphasizes the solid, windowless back of the gray block and the side of the glass tower, with awning structures visible along the sidewalk.
description_view_3: The opposite side reveals the back of the beige block with balconies, the gray block's window grid, and the glass tower in the background.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows on all facades, with some sections featuring continuous vertical strips and others with evenly spaced rows.
